expectations.text: HTML file generated: dashboard.html exists in outputs
expectations.evidence: dashboard.html exists in outputs directory, is 10,478 bytes, and contains a complete, valid HTML document with DOCTYPE, head, and body sections.

expectations.text: Three-column layout: Decided, In Discussion, Undecided columns are present
expectations.evidence: CSS uses grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr. Three <div class="column"> elements with headings: 'Decided' (h2 line 278), 'In Discussion' (h2 line 311), 'Undecided' (h2 line 329). Each column contains the appropriate cards.

expectations.text: Content fits viewport: No horizontal scrolling needed, max-width 960px
expectations.evidence: .container has max-width: 960px and margin: 0 auto. Responsive breakpoint at 700px collapses grid to single column (grid-template-columns: 1fr). No fixed widths that would cause overflow.

expectations.text: Progress indicator: Shows decided count vs total (e.g., 3/7)
expectations.evidence: progress-summary div contains '7개 항목 중 3개 결정' (Korean for '3 decided out of 7 items'). Also includes a segmented progress bar (42.86% decided, 14.28% active, 42.86% undecided) and legend labels showing '3 결정됨, 1 논의 중, 3 미결정'.

expectations.text: Correct classification: OAuth, PostgreSQL, React in Decided; API structure in In Discussion/Undecided
expectations.evidence: Decided column contains three cards: '사용자 인증' with decision 'OAuth', '데이터베이스' with decision 'PostgreSQL', '프론트엔드' with decision 'React'. In Discussion column contains 'API 구조' (API Structure) with options REST and GraphQL. All classifications match expectations.

expectations.text: Dark theme applied: #0f0f1a background with status colors (green/yellow/gray)
expectations.evidence: body background: #0f0f1a. Status colors: .decided uses #4ade80 (green), .active uses #facc15 (yellow), .undecided uses #888 (gray). These colors are consistently applied to headings, tags, progress bar segments, and card highlights.

claims.claim: Dashboard shows 7 items total with 3 decided, 1 in discussion, 3 undecided
claims.evidence: Counted cards: Decided column has 3 cards (OAuth, PostgreSQL, React), In Discussion has 1 card (API Structure), Undecided has 3 cards (Deploy Strategy, Monitoring, CI/CD). Total = 7. Matches progress summary and state.md.
order-section at bottom shows: API 구조 -> 배포 전략 -> CI/CD -> 모니터링. This follows the dependency chain in state.md.
CSS media query at max-width: 700px collapses grid to single column. Container uses max-width: 960px with auto margins.

suggestions.assertion: Progress indicator: Shows decided count vs total (e.g., 3/7)
suggestions.reason: The assertion says 'e.g., 3/7' but the actual output uses Korean text '7개 항목 중 3개 결정'. Consider whether the eval should require a specific format (like '3/7') or accept any representation of the ratio. The current assertion is ambiguous about locale.
No assertion checks that the HTML is well-formed or renderable (e.g., no unclosed tags, valid CSS). A broken HTML file could pass the file-existence check.

No assertion checks the relationship/dependency information shown on cards. The dashboard includes dependency data ('API 구조와 연결', 'Frontend, Database에서 의존') which is a valuable feature worth verifying against the state model.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions cover the key visual and structural requirements well. The main gap is locale sensitivity -- several assertions could be tripped by the Korean-language output if they were checked more literally. Consider adding an assertion for dependency/relation accuracy.
